faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Tottenville typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests and easily accessible exterior nests are usually on the lower end, while attic nests or those requiring ladder work may cost more. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service in Tottenville for most emergencies. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours of your call and can complete most wasp nest removals in 30-60 minutes. We service all areas of Tottenville, from Page Avenue to Hylan Boulevard, ensuring rapid response times.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Tottenville commonly sees yellow jackets, bald-faced hornets, and paper wasps. Yellow jackets often build nests in wall voids and underground, while paper wasps prefer sheltered outdoor spots like eaves and porch ceilings. The area's proximity to green spaces and waterways makes it particularly attractive to these stinging insects during warmer months.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use EPA-approved treatments and professional techniques that effectively eliminate wasps while minimizing exposure risks. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed and ensure the area is safe before completing our service.
